description_long: This is a pair of dark brown slip-on house slippers with a simple, functional design. The slippers feature a soft, felt-like upper material and a slightly raised, black rubber or synthetic sole that provides some grip and durability. The opening is wide and rounded, allowing for easy insertion and removal of the foot. The interior appears to be lined with a similar soft material, offering comfort for indoor use. The overall shape is low-profile and contoured to fit the foot, with minimal decorative elements. These slippers are practical for casual, everyday wear in home or indoor urban environments.
description: A pair of dark brown slip-on house slippers with soft uppers and black rubber soles, designed for comfort and easy indoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, rounded openings and the soft, felt-like upper material.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-profile shape and the black rubber sole extending around the slipper.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the contoured heel area and the overall compact design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the smooth, uninterrupted upper and the flat, supportive sole.
